description_long: This guard rail consists of two thick, vertical wooden posts supporting two horizontal wooden rails, all featuring a stylized, cartoon-like wood grain texture. The posts are robust and squared, with visible end grain patterns on the tops, and the rails are slightly irregular, giving a hand-crafted appearance. The horizontal rails are attached to the posts with large, round metal bolts, adding to the rustic and sturdy look. The wood is a rich, medium brown with darker streaks and knots, enhancing the natural aesthetic. The ends of the rails are flush with the posts, and there are no visible safety features or reflective markings. This type of guard rail would be suitable for parks, playgrounds, or decorative urban settings rather than high-impact road safety applications.
description: A stylized wooden guard rail with two thick posts and two horizontal rails, featuring visible wood grain and metal bolts. The design is rustic and decorative, suitable for parks or urban green spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing both posts and the two horizontal rails with visible wood grain and metal bolts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the posts and rails, with the rails appearing slightly offset.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the posts and rails, with less visible hardware and a simpler wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and construction of the guard rail.
